title: lyonia lucida f. rubra
intro: Lyonia lucida f. rubra, also known as the Sweetbay or Red-fruited Lyonia, is a deciduous shrub native to the southeastern United States, characterized by its bright red berries and fragrant leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lyonia lucida f. rubra include reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in herbal salves and creams to leverage its medicinal properties.
